name: @photobooth/desktop
description: PhotoBooth desktop app built with Electron
author: PhotoBooth Team

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm --workspace @photobooth/web run dev" "tsc -w -p tsconfig.json" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist/apps/desktop/src/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm --workspace @photobooth/web run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder
scripts.build:mac: npm --workspace @photobooth/web run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: npm --workspace @photobooth/web run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder --win
